headline: DeepSeek V4 Pro outperforms GPT-5.5 Pro on precision benchmarks
body: DeepSeek V4 Pro has demonstrated superior performance over OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Pro in precision testing, marking a significant shift in the competitive AI model landscape. This development matters for healthcare AI deployments because precision directly impacts diagnostic accuracy and clinical decision support reliability in EHR integrations and real-time patient workflows. As healthcare organizations evaluate foundation models for compliance-critical applications like documentation generation and clinical coding, vendor benchmarking becomes essential for procurement decisions. OpenAI's concurrent ChatGPT overhaul suggests both vendors are racing to maintain clinical relevance, which will influence how health systems architect their AI stacks moving forward.
